name: 04-network-config
args:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${target_username:+${target_username}@}${target_host} 'mkdir -p /etc/NetworkManager/conf.d; cat > /etc/NetworkManager/conf.d/calico.conf << EOF
[keyfile]
unmanaged-devices=interface-name:cali*;interface-name:tunl*
EOF
systemctl restart NetworkManager 2>/dev/null || true'
